title: Correct Recursive Logic Prompt
scenario: Generate a prompt that will produce a recursive function in Python that calculates the factorial of a given number. The function should take as input an integer and return the factorial value. The prompt should be designed to produce a function that correctly handles negative input and calculates the factorial recursively. The prompt should be under 200 characters.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the Python code is syntactically correct.
Check if the recursive algorithm correctly calculates the factorial.
Check if the code is readable and follows standard Python coding practices.
